archetype: Soft Utility (Archetype 3 adapted for outdoor/mobile use)

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Mobile-first, generous touch targets, card-based with distinct visual separation for outdoor readability.
layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Use p-4 to p-6 for containers. Emphasize vertical stacking and progressive disclosure.
layout_and_spacing.button_heights: h-14 for primary actions (thumb-friendly), h-10 for secondary.
layout_and_spacing.border_radius: rounded-2xl for main cards, rounded-xl for inner elements, rounded-full for pills and FABs.

components.buttons: Large, full-width on mobile. Primary CTA uses Emerald green for high visibility outdoors. Dark blue for secondary actions.
components.cards: White surface, 1px border of slate-200, subtle shadow-sm. active:scale-[0.98] transition-transform.
components.bottom_nav: Fixed bottom navigation with icons (Dashboard, Clientes, Quotes, Invoices). Icon color slate-400 inactive, Dark blue active.
components.badges: Used for statuses. Draft (Gray), Sent (Blue), Approved/Paid (Green), Overdue (Red). rounded-full, px-3 py-1 text-xs font-semibold.

icons.style: stroke-width 2, clean, readable at small sizes.

motion.hover_states: subtle opacity changes or slight upward translation (-translate-y-0.5) for cards.
motion.tap_states: active:scale-95 on all clickable mobile elements to provide instant tactile feedback.

image_urls.description: Illustration of Latino contractor using app, flat design matching colors. Use for Login/Welcome screen.
Subtle abstract texture for app backgrounds or auth screens.
Photo of a contractor in a blue jacket/helmet, use for demo user profile avatar.
Photo of a contractor holding a phone outdoors, use for onboarding or empty states.

accessibility.contrast: High contrast required for outdoor visibility in direct sunlight. Avoid low contrast grays on white.
accessibility.touch_targets: Minimum 48x48px for all interactable elements to support thick fingers.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the application strictly mobile-first. Assume the vast majority of usage is on a smartphone.
The UI text must be in Spanish (for the business owner/dueño) but any generated output/documents/messages must be stored and generated in English.
Implement a persistent bottom navigation bar on mobile view.
Do not use complex tables for lists. Use stacked cards (List Cards) with an Avatar/Icon + Title + Subtitle + Status Badge for Clients, Quotes, and Jobs.
When creating the AI Quote Builder, use a wizard interface or chat-like flow. Provide large, prominent buttons for 'Voice input' or 'Photo upload'.
Ensure data-testid attributes are included on every button, input, tab, and interactable card.
Use Shadcn UI components but heavily override their default classes (remove enterprise look) to use rounded-2xl corners, larger paddings, and the defined color palette.
